title: India: Factory workers told to film themselves for AI/robot training
abstract: India: Factory workers told to film themselves for AI/robot training automates data preprocessing, statistical analysis, and model training. Skip the grunt work and go straight to insights. Boost y...
abstract_zh: 印度工厂工人被告知自拍当AI训练素材，这波操作简直承包了所有厂哥的下班时间！从数据预处理到模型训练，一气呵成。告别枯燥的数据分析，直接跳到结论环节。老板直呼内行，工人们却在想：我这是为科技献身还是被科技耍了？
